mapper.select: SELECT role FROM tb_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tb_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role = #{role}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_role (user_id, role, granted_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{role}, #{grantedBy})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role = #{role}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM tb_user_role WHERE granted_by = #{userId}
